mapper.insert: insert into clazz(name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time) values(#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId}, #{subject}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update clazz
name = #{name},
room = #{room},
begin_date = #{beginDate},
end_date = #{endDate},
master_id = #{masterId},
subject = #{subject},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT clazz.id, clazz.name, clazz.room, clazz.begin_date AS beginDate, clazz.end_date AS endDate, clazz.master_id AS masterId, dept.name AS subject, clazz.create_time AS createTime, clazz.update_time AS updateTime, emp.name AS masterName FROM clazz LEFT JOIN emp ON clazz.master_id = emp.id LEFT JOIN dept ON clazz.subject = dept.id WHERE clazz.id = #{id}
